modules.label: Jerobeam WirdoSpiral
modules.description: Spiral shaped by a splash/cut/scrap layer -- a warped, textured take on the Spiral engine.

modules.label: Jerobeam Blubb
modules.description: A soft, rounded blob shape rotated through X/Y with a zDepth squish.

modules.label: Jerobeam Boing
modules.description: A bouncing, elastic sphere-like shape with a boing/rebound stage.

modules.label: Jerobeam Kepler-Bouwkamp
modules.description: Nested regular polygons spiraling inward, based on the Kepler-Bouwkamp constant construction.

modules.label: Jerobeam Mushroom
modules.description: A cap-and-stem mushroom cluster shape with independent cap/cluster rotation.

modules.label: Jerobeam Nyquist-Shannon
modules.description: A sample-rate/aliasing-aware waveform named for the Nyquist-Shannon sampling theorem.

modules.label: Jerobeam Radar
modules.description: A rotating polar scanner-beam sweep folded into Cartesian X/Y motion, with ring-cut and tunnel-inversion stages.

modules.label: Jerobeam Torus
modules.description: A nested 3-layer spiral rotated in 3D and projected with zDepth, forming a torus-like motion.
